_doc: Sample dry-run fixture for `_active_snapshot()` per N179 BULK. Loaded by `src/brickvision_runtime/capability_graph/retrieve.py:_read_dry_run_active_snapshot` when `BV_DRY_RUN=true`. Override the path via `BV_DRY_RUN_ACTIVE_SNAPSHOT_PATH` for test isolation. Set `is_active=false` to model the 'no active snapshot' state.
